productDisplayName: ADIDAS Men Sprint Speed Black Sports Shoes
description: Take running to the next level with these Sprint Speed shoes from adidas. These comfortable trainers are engineered with superior cushioning with better shock absorption properties. Team them up with jeans and tees for a cool casual look. Upper Meshed upper with synthetic overlays for better breathability and structure Lace-ups for better Fit Iconic three stripes symbolising the challenges that are seen ahead and goals that can be achieved on the sides Padded and meshed collar and tongue and textile shoe lining for better comfort Branding on the tongue and at the back of the collar Midsole EVA sockliner and comfort cushioning for all day comfort Outsole Ridged and multi-directional rubber outsole Shoe care Wipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth Do not machine wash
